description: Sector overlay for U.S. nonprofit, charity, foundation, tax-exempt, donor-funded, advocacy, and civil-society documentation.

metadata.scope: United States sector overlay controls for NGO and Nonprofit. Intended to be used with us/core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from U.S. federal statutes, regulations, agency guidance, regulator materials, and sector frameworks available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State, territorial, tribal, and local obligations may impose additional requirements.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: IRS charitable organization exemption and required filings materials
State charity registration frameworks
primary_sources.issuer: State Attorneys General / Secretaries of State / charity regulators

primary_sources.name: OFAC sanctions compliance materials
primary_sources.issuer: U.S. Department of the Treasury / OFAC

rules.title: IRS tax-exempt status or charitable-purpose evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for 501(c)(3), tax-exempt determination, exempt purposes, charitable organization, or IRS recognition evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Annual filing, Form 990, or public-inspection evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for Form 990, annual return, public inspection, audited financials, or IRS annual filing evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Political campaign, lobbying, and private-benefit restrictions are addressed
rules.summary: Checks for campaign intervention restrictions, lobbying limits, private inurement, private benefit, conflict of interest, or board governance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Charitable solicitation or donor-compliance evidence is present where fundraising is described
rules.summary: Checks for state charitable solicitation registration, fundraising disclosure, donor restriction, grant compliance, or sanctions-screening evidence.
